//: Copy this file to appsettings.json (git-ignored) and fill in real values.
//Serilog: Console + daily rolling file (logs/website-*.txt), like the bot. The site logs each user roster action at Information.
//BotDbConnectionString: MySQL connection string for the bot database (same DB the bot uses).
//CocApiCacheConnectionString: The CoC cache DB (same as the bot's). Read-only here, used to resolve clan names.
//CocApiToken: Official Clash of Clans API key for authoritative player lookups on 'Add player'. IP-locked: create a key scoped to this server's IP at developer.clashofclans.com (a dedicated web key is fine).
//MySqlServerVersion: Your DB server version, e.g. '8.0.0-mysql' or '10.11.0-mariadb'. Avoids a connection at startup.

Discord.//ClientId: Discord application Client ID (Developer Portal > OAuth2).
Discord.//BotToken: Bot token, used to look up a member's roles in the guild for authorization.
Discord.//GuildId: The community server (guild) id used for membership/role checks.
Discord.//RequiredRoleId: Discord role id that grants roster access (e.g. the bot's FamilyLeadershipRoleId). Users without it can sign in but see nothing.
